Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance With Somebody (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,708,080Details
International Box Office $35,677,104
Worldwide Box Office $59,385,184
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $936,879
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $726,385
Total $1,663,264
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A portrait of the complex and multifaceted woman behind The Voice. From New Jersey choir girl to one of the best-selling and most awarded recording artists of all time, a journey through Houston’s trailblazing life and career.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,700,450 (19.8% of total gross)
Legs:5.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,625 opening theaters/3,625 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,482,824

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 23rd, 2022 (Wide) by Sony Pictures, released as Whitney Houston I Wanna Dance With Somebody
International Releases: December 21st, 2022 (Wide), released as Whitney Houston I Wanna Dance With Somebody (Spain)
December 21st, 2022 (Wide) (France)
December 22nd, 2022 (Wide) (Slovakia)
December 22nd, 2022 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
December 22nd, 2022 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: February 7th, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment, released as Whitney Houston I Wanna Dance With Somebody
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong drug content, some strong language, suggestive references and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2761 (cert #54100), 12/7/2022)
Running Time: 146 minutes
Plot point: Addiction, African Americans, Biography, Musicians
Social setting: Pop Music
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production Countries: United States, New Zealand
Languages: English
